blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this learning path! Job well done!

You've accomplished the following:

- Explained what Grafana Alloy is and why a single multi-signal collector reduces collector sprawl
- Described how Alloy collects, transforms, and sends telemetry
- Recognized the default Alloy engine versus the experimental OpenTelemetry Engine
- Read a simple component pipeline and mapped it to collect → process → export
- Found Alloy-related options in Grafana Cloud Connections
- Located Fleet Management for collector operations at scale
- Identified hands-on next steps across learning paths, the beginners playlist, and alloy-scenarios

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Send logs to Grafana Cloud using Alloy](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/send-logs-alloy-loki/)
- [Monitor collector health using Grafana Fleet Management](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/fleet-mgt-monitor-health/)
- [Tour Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/grafana-cloud-tour/)
